name: Blackberry Crisp
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 1-quart oven-proof casserole dish, toss together blackberries, sugar, lemon juice, and flour.
2. Cut the butter into small pieces and sprinkle over the blackberries.
3. To prepare the topping, in a small bowl, stir together flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Combine the butter into the flour mixture using fingertips until it is crumbly.
5. Sprinkle the topping over the blackberries.
6. Bake at 375°F until the berries bubble and the topping browns, about 40 minutes.
